scripts.dev:watch: npm run copy:assets && tsc -w & nodemon --watch dist dist/server.js
scripts.copy:assets: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src=path.resolve('src','db','schema.sql'); const dstDir=path.resolve('dist','db'); const dst=path.join(dstDir,'schema.sql'); fs.mkdirSync(dstDir,{recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync(src,dst); console.log('[build] copied schema.sql to dist/db');"
scripts.rebuild:pty: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process'); const arch=process.arch; const platform=process.platform; console.log('[rebuild] platform='+platform+' arch='+arch); execSync('npm rebuild node-pty', {stdio:'inherit'});"
